creator: jdunn@verticalscope.com
text:
There is a format string vulnerability in the stunnel port.

	See: http://www.stunnel.org/patches/desc/formatbug_ml.html for a patch
	against 3.21c (or there is also a 3.22 version available)

Fix: 

Maintainer should upgrade port to the current revision 3.22 or apply patch:
	http://www.stunnel.org/patches/patches/formatbug_ml.patch
